name: work-loop-checkpoint-recovery
title: Recover paused work-loop checkpoints

notes: Reproduced from downstream run 3248D9B5-9487-4DAC-9F0E-05CAB495ABB7 after PR #15 merged while the ledger was paused in checkpoint phase.
